note: CIRCULATING SUPPLY card colour changed from berenjena (#6B3F6B) to canary yellow (#FFFF00). Both the value text (#dCircReal) and the subtitle (#dCircRealSub) updated in lockstep so the formula label 'total - vault - pool' stays the same yellow as the number.
